title: After-School Exercise 课后锻炼
scene: Kevin和Eric放学后在操场锻炼身体。

lines.en: Eric, do you want to exercise after school?
Sure. What do you want to do?
Let us do push-ups first. I can do twenty.
lines.zh: 我们先做俯卧撑吧。我能做二十个。

lines.en: Twenty? I can only do ten.
That is OK. Let us start together.
lines.zh: 没关系。我们一起开始吧。

lines.en: One, two, three... this is hard!
Keep going! You can do five more.
lines.zh: 坚持住！你还能再做五个。

lines.en: Now let us do sit-ups. Lie on your back.
lines.zh: 现在我们做仰卧起坐。躺下来。

lines.en: OK. Let us count together. One, two, three...
lines.zh: 好的。我们一起数。一、二、三……

lines.en: Great job! Let us do this every day.
lines.zh: 做得好！我们每天都这样锻炼吧。
